title: 要人: Biden班底拒見「香港抗爭陣營」, 需要吸引更多傳媒報導

replies.msg:
黎智英助手Mark Simon: Biden班底拒見「香港抗爭陣營」
https://lihkg.com/thread/2142778/page/1

但而家, 單野都仲未有各大傳媒報導.

所以,需要手足幫手: 將呢單新聞報料比各大主流英文傳媒, 吸引更多主流英文傳媒報導.

報料重點  
1) 報料時, 要連埋以下文章 (以下兩篇文章證明Mark Simon係黎智英助手, 亦列出中共如何打壓黎智英.)
https://www.wsj.com/articles/the-peoples-republic-vs-jimmy-lai-11590100278
https://edition.cnn.com/2020/02/28/media/hong-kong-jimmy-lai-arrest-intl-hnk/index.html

2) 要貼呢篇文, 講明Donald Trump政府都不斷接見香港抗爭陣營既人, 點解Biden班底唔肯?
https://www.thestandard.com.hk/section-news/section/11/221183/Law-urges-strong-foreign-action-in-Pompeo-meeting

3)建議大家可以報料俾以下媒體 (千萬不要透過twitter報料, 一來無用, 二來唔夠隱密):
https://help.foxnews.com/hc/en-us/articles/233193788-Does-FoxNews-com-have-a-news-hotline-
https://www.washingtonpost.com/anonymous-news-tips/
https://www.wsj.com/tips
https://www.nytimes.com/tips
https://www.reuters.com/investigates/special-report/tips/
https://apnews.com/fad6c09c39f24d9299be4e4baecea524
https://edition.cnn.com/tips/
https://www.bloomberg.com/tips/
https://newyork.cbslocal.com/contact-us/
https://www.cnbc.com/news-tips/
https://www.theguardian.com/community/2015/sep/02/guardianwitness-send-us-a-story
https://www.ft.com/news-tips/

需要有主流媒體報導, 先可以向Biden班底施壓.
(只由細媒體首先報導, 就完全無用).

quote.msg:
黎智英助手Mark Simon: Biden班底拒見「香港抗爭陣營」
https://lihkg.com/thread/2142778/page/1

但而家, 單野都仲未有各大傳媒報導.

所以,需要手足幫手: 將呢單新聞報料比各大主流英文傳媒, 吸引更多主流英文傳媒報導.

報料重點  
1) 報料時, 要連埋以下文章 (以下兩篇文章證明Mark Simon係黎智英助手, 亦列出中共如何打壓黎智英.)
https://www.wsj.com/articles/the-peoples-republic-vs-jimmy-lai-11590100278
https://edition.cnn.com/2020/02/28/media/hong-kong-jimmy-lai-arrest-intl-hnk/index.html

2) 要貼呢篇文, 講明Donald Trump政府都不斷接見香港抗爭陣營既人, 點解Biden班底唔肯?
https://www.thestandard.com.hk/section-news/section/11/221183/Law-urges-strong-foreign-action-in-Pompeo-meeting

3)建議大家可以報料俾以下媒體 (千萬不要透過twitter報料, 一來無用, 二來唔夠隱密):
https://help.foxnews.com/hc/en-us/articles/233193788-Does-FoxNews-com-have-a-news-hotline-
https://www.washingtonpost.com/anonymous-news-tips/
https://www.wsj.com/tips
https://www.nytimes.com/tips
https://www.reuters.com/investigates/special-report/tips/
https://apnews.com/fad6c09c39f24d9299be4e4baecea524
https://edition.cnn.com/tips/
https://www.bloomberg.com/tips/
https://newyork.cbslocal.com/contact-us/
https://www.cnbc.com/news-tips/
https://www.theguardian.com/community/2015/sep/02/guardianwitness-send-us-a-story
https://www.ft.com/news-tips/

琴日有人提議報比美國民主黨議員睇
或者搵當地媒體去
